api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Account.IAccountC.title: Interface IAccountClient | Pt.Okx.Sdk API
api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Account.IAccountC.summary: Interface IAccountClient Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Account Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Interface for account clients, providing methods to query trading account information. public interface IAccountClient Properties AvailableBalance Gets the available balance that can be used to open new positions. decimal AvailableBalance { get; } Property Value decimal The available balance value. Equity Gets the account equity (Wallet Balance + Unrealized PnL). decimal Equity { get; } Property Value decimal The equity value. InitialMargin Gets the total initial margin currently in use. decimal InitialMargin { get; } Property Value decimal The initial margin value. UnrealizedPnL Gets the total unrealized profit and loss (PnL) from open positions. decimal UnrealizedPnL { get; } Property Value decimal The unrealized PnL value. WalletBalance Gets the total actual wallet balance (excluding unrealized PnL). decimal WalletBalance { get; } Property Value decimal The wallet balance value. Methods AccountSelect(string) Selects and retrieves detailed information for a specific asset (e.g., "USDT"). AccountBalanceDetail? AccountSelect(string currency = "USDT") Parameters currency string The asset currency (default is "USDT"). Returns AccountBalanceDetail The balance information for the specified asset, or null if not found. GetBalances() Gets detailed information about the trading account balance. AccountBalance? GetBalances() Returns AccountBalance The current account balance, or null if unavailable. GetCurrentDrawdown() Calculates the current account drawdown compared to the equity peak. decimal GetCurrentDrawdown() Returns decimal The current drawdown value. GetCurrentEquity() Gets the current equity value of the account. decimal GetCurrentEquity() Returns decimal The current equity value. GetEquityChangePercentage() Calculates the percentage change in equity compared to a reference point. decimal GetEquityChangePercentage() Returns decimal The equity change percentage. GetFeeLevelAsync() Gets information about the account's trading fee VIP level. Task<ApiResult<FeeVipLevel>> GetFeeLevelAsync() Returns Task<ApiResult<FeeVipLevel>> The fee VIP level wrapped in a WebCallResult. GetLeverage(string) Gets the current leverage for a specific contract. decimal GetLeverage(string symbol) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. Returns decimal The leverage value. GetMarginRatio() Calculates the margin ratio. Positions may be liquidated if this reaches 100%. decimal GetMarginRatio() Returns decimal The margin ratio value. IsHedgeMode() Checks if the account is currently in Hedge Mode. bool IsHedgeMode() Returns bool True if in Hedge Mode; otherwise, false. LoadBalanceAsync(CancellationToken) Asynchronously refreshes the account balance information from the exchange. Task<ApiResult<AccountBalance>> LoadBalanceAsync(CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters ct CancellationToken Returns Task<ApiResult<AccountBalance>> The refreshed account balance wrapped in a WebCallResult. SetHedgeModeAsync(bool, CancellationToken) Sets the position mode (Hedge Mode or Netting Mode). Task<(bool Success, string? Error)> SetHedgeModeAsync(bool hedge, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters hedge bool True for Hedge Mode; false for Netting Mode. ct CancellationToken A cancellation token. Returns Task<(bool Success, string Error)> A tuple indicating success and an optional error message. SetInitialLeverageAsync(string, int, CancellationToken) Sets the initial leverage for a specific contract. Task<bool> SetInitialLeverageAsync(string symbol, int leverage, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. leverage int The leverage value to set. ct CancellationToken A cancellation token. Returns Task<bool> True if successful; otherwise, false.

api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Instruments.IInst.summary: Interface IInstrumentClient Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Instruments Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Interface for instrument clients, providing methods to query trading instrument information. public interface IInstrumentClient Properties InstrumentType Gets the type of trading instrument handled by this client (e.g., Futures, Spot). InstrumentType InstrumentType { get; } Property Value InstrumentType Methods BaseAsset(string) Gets the base asset for the specified symbol (e.g., "BTC"). string BaseAsset(string symbol) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. Returns string The base asset string. ContractMultiplier(string) Gets the contract multiplier for the specified symbol (for Options). decimal ContractMultiplier(string symbol) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. Returns decimal The contract multiplier value. ContractSize(string) Gets the contract size for the specified symbol (for Futures/Swap). decimal ContractSize(string symbol) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. Returns decimal The contract size value. GetAskAsync(string, CancellationToken) Gets the current ask price for the specified symbol. Task<ApiResult<decimal>> GetAskAsync(string symbol, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task<ApiResult<decimal>> The ask price wrapped in a WebCallResult. GetBidAskSpreadAsync(string, CancellationToken) Gets the bid price, ask price, and spread for the specified symbol in a single call. Task<ApiResult<(decimal Bid, decimal Ask, decimal Spread)>> GetBidAskSpreadAsync(string symbol, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task<ApiResult<(decimal Bid, decimal Ask, decimal Spread)>> A tuple containing bid, ask, and spread values wrapped in a WebCallResult. GetBidAsync(string, CancellationToken) Gets the current bid price for the specified symbol. Task<ApiResult<decimal>> GetBidAsync(string symbol, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task<ApiResult<decimal>> The bid price wrapped in a WebCallResult. GetCurrentTime() Gets the current system time. DateTime GetCurrentTime() Returns DateTime The current system time as a DateTime object. GetFeeMaker(string) Gets the maker trading fee for the specified symbol. decimal GetFeeMaker(string symbol) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. Returns decimal The maker fee value. GetFeeTaker(string) Gets the taker trading fee for the specified symbol. decimal GetFeeTaker(string symbol) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. Returns decimal The taker fee value. GetHighPriceAsync(string, CancellationToken) Gets the highest price within a recent time frame for the specified symbol. Task<ApiResult<decimal>> GetHighPriceAsync(string symbol, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task<ApiResult<decimal>> The high price wrapped in a WebCallResult. GetLastPriceAsync(string, CancellationToken) Gets the last traded price for the specified symbol. Task<ApiResult<decimal>> GetLastPriceAsync(string symbol, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task<ApiResult<decimal>> The last price wrapped in a WebCallResult. GetLimitLotSize(string, bool) Gets the minimum, maximum, and step size for lot orders for the specified symbol. (decimal MinQuantity, decimal MaxQuantity, decimal StepSize) GetLimitLotSize(string symbol, bool isMarket) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. isMarket bool True for market orders; otherwise, false for limit orders. Returns (decimal MinQuantity, decimal MaxQuantity, decimal StepSize) A tuple containing min, max, and step size values. GetLimitMaxCost(string, bool) Gets the maximum allowed cost for an order for the specified symbol. decimal GetLimitMaxCost(string symbol, bool isMarket) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. isMarket bool True for market orders; otherwise, false for limit orders. Returns decimal The maximum cost value. GetLimitPriceAsync(string, CancellationToken) Gets the limit price for the specified symbol (for limit orders). Task<ApiResult<LimitPrice>> GetLimitPriceAsync(string symbol, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task<ApiResult<LimitPrice>> The limit price wrapped in a WebCallResult. GetLowPriceAsync(string, CancellationToken) Gets the lowest price within a recent time frame for the specified symbol. Task<ApiResult<decimal>> GetLowPriceAsync(string symbol, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task<ApiResult<decimal>> The low price wrapped in a WebCallResult. GetMaintMarginRateAsync(string, decimal, CancellationToken) Gets the maintenance margin rate for the specified symbol and position notional. Task<decimal> GetMaintMarginRateAsync(string symbol, decimal positionNotional, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. positionNotional decimal The notional value of the position. ct CancellationToken A cancellation token. Returns Task<decimal> The maintenance margin rate. GetMarkPriceAsync(string, CancellationToken) Gets the mark price for the specified symbol (important for Futures/Swap). Task<ApiResult<decimal>> GetMarkPriceAsync(string symbol, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task<ApiResult<decimal>> The mark price wrapped in a WebCallResult. GetPrecisionLot(string) Gets the lot size precision (number of decimal places) for the specified symbol. int GetPrecisionLot(string symbol) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. Returns int The lot size precision. GetPrecisionPrice(string) Gets the price precision (number of decimal places) for the specified symbol. int GetPrecisionPrice(string symbol) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. Returns int The price precision. GetSpreadAsync(string, CancellationToken) Gets the spread (difference between ask and bid prices) for the specified symbol. Task<ApiResult<decimal>> GetSpreadAsync(string symbol, CancellationToken ct = default) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. ct CancellationToken Cancellation token. Returns Task<ApiResult<decimal>> The spread value wrapped in a WebCallResult. GetTickPrice(string) Gets the tick size (minimum price increment) for the specified symbol. decimal GetTickPrice(string symbol) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. Returns decimal The tick size value. IsSymbol(string) Checks if the specified symbol is a valid and tracked trading symbol. bool IsSymbol(string symbol) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol to check. Returns bool True if the symbol is valid and tracked; otherwise, false. NormalizeLot(string, decimal, bool, bool) Normalizes the lot size according to exchange rules. decimal NormalizeLot(string symbol, decimal lot, bool isMarket, bool roundUp = false) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. lot decimal The lot size to normalize. isMarket bool True for market orders (may have different rules than limit orders). roundUp bool True to round up; false to round down. Returns decimal The normalized lot size. NormalizePrice(string, decimal, bool) Normalizes the price according to exchange rules (rounded by price precision). decimal NormalizePrice(string symbol, decimal price, bool roundUp = false) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. price decimal The price to normalize. roundUp bool True to round up; false to round down. Returns decimal The normalized price. QuoteAsset(string) Gets the quote asset for the specified symbol (e.g., "USDT"). string QuoteAsset(string symbol) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. Returns string The quote asset string. Symbol(long) Gets the trading symbol string for the specified unique symbol code (long integer). string Symbol(long symbolCode) Parameters symbolCode long The unique symbol code. Returns string The trading symbol string. SymbolCode(string) Gets the unique symbol code (long integer) for the specified trading symbol, and vice versa. long SymbolCode(string symbol) Parameters symbol string Returns long TotalSymbols() Gets the total number of trading symbols currently tracked. int TotalSymbols() Returns int The total count of tracked symbols. Underlying(string) Gets the underlying asset for the specified symbol (for derivatives). string Underlying(string symbol) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. Returns string The underlying asset string.

api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Market.Enums.Ohlc.summary: Enum OhlcPattern Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Market.Enums Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Intrabar OHLC path used when replaying candle data as ticks. public enum OhlcPattern Extension Methods DrawingEnumExtensions.GetDescription<TEnum>(TEnum) Fields Auto = 0 Choose the path automatically from the candle direction. HighFirst = 1 Replay as Open, High, Low, Close. LowFirst = 2 Replay as Open, Low, High, Close. Random = 3 Choose a random path for each candle.

api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Market.Enums.Tick.title: Enum TickType | Pt.Okx.Sdk API
api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Market.Enums.Tick.summary: Enum TickType Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Market.Enums Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Represents the role of a tick within a candle during replay or real-time streaming. public enum TickType : byte Extension Methods DrawingEnumExtensions.GetDescription<TEnum>(TEnum) Fields Close = 3 The closing tick of a candle (Close price). High = 1 The tick representing the highest price within the candle. Low = 2 The tick representing the lowest price within the candle. Mid = 4 An interpolated tick within the candle, not directly from market data. Used for simulation or smoothing between OHLC points. Open = 0 The opening tick of a candle (Open price). Realtime = 5 A tick received directly from a real-time market data stream.

api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Market.Models.Can.summary: Struct CandleData Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Market.Models Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Represents OHLCV data for a specific trading candle. This record struct is designed for memory efficiency and cache locality in high-frequency scenarios. public readonly record struct CandleData : IComparable<CandleData>, IEquatable<CandleData> Implements IComparable<CandleData> IEquatable<CandleData> Inherited Members ValueType.Equals(object) ValueType.GetHashCode() object.Equals(object, object) object.GetType() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) Constructors CandleData(DateTime, decimal, decimal, decimal, decimal, decimal, bool) Initializes a new instance of the CandleData struct. public CandleData(DateTime timestamp, decimal open, decimal high, decimal low, decimal close, decimal volume, bool isCompleted = false) Parameters timestamp DateTime The timestamp of the candle. open decimal The opening price. high decimal The highest price. low decimal The lowest price. close decimal The closing price. volume decimal The trading volume. isCompleted bool Whether the candle is completed. Properties Close Gets the closing price. public decimal Close { get; init; } Property Value decimal Empty Gets a representative empty CandleData instance. public static CandleData Empty { get; } Property Value CandleData High Gets the highest price during the period. public decimal High { get; init; } Property Value decimal IsCompleted Gets a value indicating whether the candle represents a completed time period. public bool IsCompleted { get; init; } Property Value bool IsEmpty Gets a value indicating whether the candle is empty (has a default timestamp). [JsonIgnore] public bool IsEmpty { get; } Property Value bool Low Gets the lowest price during the period. public decimal Low { get; init; } Property Value decimal Open Gets the opening price. public decimal Open { get; init; } Property Value decimal Timestamp Gets the timestamp of the candle. public DateTime Timestamp { get; init; } Property Value DateTime Volume Gets the trading volume during the period. public decimal Volume { get; init; } Property Value decimal Methods CompareTo(CandleData) Compares the current instance with another object of the same type and returns an integer that indicates whether the current instance precedes, follows, or occurs in the same position in the sort order as the other object. public int CompareTo(CandleData other) Parameters other CandleData An object to compare with this instance. Returns int A value that indicates the relative order of the objects being compared. The return value has these meanings: Value Meaning Less than zero This instance precedes other in the sort order. Zero This instance occurs in the same position in the sort order as other. Greater than zero This instance follows other in the sort order. ToString() Returns the fully qualified type name of this instance. public override string ToString() Returns string The fully qualified type name. Operators operator >(CandleData, CandleData) public static bool operator >(CandleData left, CandleData right) Parameters left CandleData right CandleData Returns bool operator >=(CandleData, CandleData) public static bool operator >=(CandleData left, CandleData right) Parameters left CandleData right CandleData Returns bool operator <(CandleData, CandleData) public static bool operator <(CandleData left, CandleData right) Parameters left CandleData right CandleData Returns bool operator <=(CandleData, CandleData) public static bool operator <=(CandleData left, CandleData right) Parameters left CandleData right CandleData Returns bool

api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Market.Models.Tic.summary: Struct TickData Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Market.Models Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Represents the smallest data unit in the simulation system. In real-time trading, this is sourced directly from the exchange's WebSocket tickers channel. public readonly struct TickData : IEquatable<TickData> Implements IEquatable<TickData> Inherited Members ValueType.ToString() object.Equals(object, object) object.GetType() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) Constructors TickData(long, double, float, byte, TickType) Initializes a new instance of the TickData struct. public TickData(long tsTicks, double price, float vol, byte idx, TickType type) Parameters tsTicks long The UTC timestamp in ticks. price double The price. vol float The volume. idx byte The tick index. type TickType The tick type. Fields Empty Gets a representative empty TickData instance. public static readonly TickData Empty Field Value TickData Price The price of the tick. public readonly double Price Field Value double TickIndex The sequential index of this tick within its context. public readonly byte TickIndex Field Value byte TimestampTicks The UTC timestamp in ticks. public readonly long TimestampTicks Field Value long Type The type of the tick (e.g., trade, bid, ask). public readonly TickType Type Field Value TickType Volume The volume traded in this tick. public readonly float Volume Field Value float Properties IsEmpty Gets a value indicating whether the tick data is empty (contains default values). public bool IsEmpty { get; } Property Value bool Timestamp Gets the UTC DateTime representation of the tick's timestamp. public DateTime Timestamp { get; } Property Value DateTime Methods Equals(TickData) Determines whether this instance is equal to another TickData. Returns bool true if all fields are equal; otherwise false. Equals(object?) Returns bool true if the object is a TickData and is equal to this instance; otherwise false. GetHashCode() Returns a hash code for this instance based on all fields. public override int GetHashCode() Returns int The computed hash code. Operators operator ==(TickData, TickData) Determines whether two TickData instances are equal. public static bool operator ==(TickData left, TickData right) Parameters left TickData The first instance to compare. right TickData The second instance to compare. Returns bool true if both instances are equal; otherwise false. operator !=(TickData, TickData) Determines whether two TickData instances are not equal. public static bool operator !=(TickData left, TickData right) Parameters left TickData The first instance to compare. right TickData The second instance to compare. Returns bool true if the instances are not equal; otherwise false.

api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Market.Models.Tic.title: Class TickSourceConfig | Pt.Okx.Sdk API
api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Market.Models.Tic.summary: Class TickSourceConfig Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients.Market.Models Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Configuration for synthetic tick generation during backtests. This does not affect real-time tick sources. public class TickSourceConfig Inheritance object TickSourceConfig Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Properties NoiseAmplitude Gets or sets the maximum noise amplitude as a fraction of the candle spread. For example, 0.1 means up to 10% of High - Low. public double NoiseAmplitude { get; set; } Property Value double OhlcPattern Gets or sets the generated tick path pattern inside each OHLC candle. public OhlcPattern OhlcPattern { get; set; } Property Value OhlcPattern RandomSeed Gets or sets the random seed used for reproducible backtests. Null means a new random sequence for each run. public int? RandomSeed { get; set; } Property Value int? TicksPerCandle Gets or sets the number of generated ticks per one-minute candle. Lower values are faster; higher values are more precise. Recommended range: 10 to 60. public int TicksPerCandle { get; set; } Property Value int UseNoise Gets or sets whether random noise is applied to intermediate prices. Enabled is more realistic; disabled is deterministic and better for tests. public bool UseNoise { get; set; } Property Value bool

AlgoOrderState OKX algorithmic order lifecycle states. AlgoOrderType OKX algorithmic order types exposed by the SDK mapper layer. AlgoPriceType Price sources used by OKX algorithmic orders. CheckUnitType Currency unit transitions returned by OKX order checks. ClosingPositionType Reasons or styles for closing a position. MarginMode Margin modes. OrderFlowType Order liquidity role. OrderStatus OKX order states. PositionMode Account position mode. QuantityAsset Quantity asset type for order placement. QuickMarginType Quick margin behavior for margin orders. TransactionType OKX transaction types used by fills and account history mappers. TriggerOrderKind Order kind for trigger order legs. TriggerPriceType Trigger price source for conditional orders.

Inheritance object ApiResult ApiResult<T> Inherited Members ApiResult.Success ApiResult.Error ApiResult.ToBoolean() object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) Remarks When Success is true, Data contains the result. api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Common.ApiResult.html.title: Class ApiResult | Pt.Okx.Sdk API
api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Common.ApiResult.html.summary: Class ApiResult Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Common Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Represents the result of an API operation. public class ApiResult Inheritance object ApiResult Derived ApiResult<T> Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) Remarks This type encapsulates both success and failure outcomes. When Success is false, Error will contain details. Properties Error Gets the error details if the operation failed; otherwise null. public ApiError? Error { get; } Property Value ApiError Success Gets a value indicating whether the operation completed successfully. public bool Success { get; } Property Value bool Methods ToBoolean() Returns whether the operation succeeded. public bool ToBoolean() Returns bool true if the operation succeeded; otherwise false. ToString() Returns a string representation of the result. public override string ToString() Returns string "Success" if successful; otherwise an error description. Operators implicit operator bool(ApiResult?) Enables implicit conversion of ApiResult to bool. public static implicit operator bool(ApiResult? result) Parameters result ApiResult The result instance to evaluate. Returns bool true if the operation succeeded; otherwise false. Remarks Returns true if Success is true; otherwise false. This allows usage in boolean expressions. Example: if (result) { // Handle success } ⚠️ Use with caution: this conversion may hide error details. Prefer checking Success and Error explicitly in critical flows.

(does not include empty parts) int Count { get; } Property Value int CurrentTime Indicator's current time based on the period (only applicable for backtest). DateTime CurrentTime { get; set; } Property Value DateTime FullCount Total number of elements from the beginning to the end of the buffer that have been filled with data. Different from Count: Count only calculates the current number of elements, while FullCount includes the offset (_startIndex + Count). int FullCount { get; } Property Value int InternalValues Returns all indicator values (original array) IReadOnlyList<IndicatorValue> InternalValues { get; } Property Value IReadOnlyList<IndicatorValue> this[int] Accesses elements by index. If not found, returns the default value. IndicatorValue FindAtOrBefore(DateTime dateTime) Parameters dateTime DateTime Returns IndicatorValue FindAtOrBeforeCurrent(int) Returns the indicator value at or before the time CurrentTime. IndicatorValue FindAtOrBeforeCurrent(int offset = 0) Parameters offset int Number of steps back from the found position. Returns IndicatorValue FindBefore(DateTime, int) Finds and returns n elements before (or at) a given time. (Usually used to retrieve historical data before a time point in trading) IEnumerable<IndicatorValue> FindBefore(DateTime dateTime, int count) Parameters dateTime DateTime count int Returns IEnumerable<IndicatorValue> FindBefore(int) Finds and returns n elements before (or at) the current time. (Usually used to retrieve the most recent historical data compared to the current time in trading) IEnumerable<IndicatorValue> FindBefore(int count) Parameters count int Returns IEnumerable<IndicatorValue> FindClosest(DateTime) Finds and returns the value closest to the time passed in dateTime. api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators.Models.Indicat.title: Class IndicatorConfig | Pt.Okx.Sdk API
api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators.Models.Indicat.summary: Class IndicatorConfig Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators.Models Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Represents the runtime configuration used to create and identify an indicator instance. This includes the trading symbol, timeframe, indicator type, parameters, and optional input sources for chained indicators. public class IndicatorConfig Inheritance object IndicatorConfig Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Constructors IndicatorConfig(string, Timeframe, IndicatorType) Initializes a new instance of IndicatorConfig. public IndicatorConfig(string symbol, Timeframe timeFrame, IndicatorType indicatorType) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol (e.g. BTCUSDT). timeFrame Timeframe The timeframe for calculation. indicatorType IndicatorType The indicator type. Properties CustomName Gets or sets the custom indicator name. null indicates a built-in indicator. public string? CustomName { get; set; } Property Value string IndicatorType Gets the indicator type. For custom indicators, this is typically CUSTOM, and CustomName is used to distinguish the implementation. public IndicatorType IndicatorType { get; } Property Value IndicatorType Parameters Gets or sets the parameter collection used by the indicator. public IndicatorParameters Parameters { get; set; } Property Value IndicatorParameters Source Gets the first source for backward compatibility with single-source usage. If no sources are defined, a default source instance is returned. public IndicatorSource Source { get; } Property Value IndicatorSource Sources Gets or sets the list of input sources consumed by the indicator. Each source may represent either a candle price or another indicator buffer. public IReadOnlyList<IndicatorSource> Sources { get; } Property Value IReadOnlyList<IndicatorSource> Symbol Gets the trading symbol this indicator is associated with. public string Symbol { get; } Property Value string TimeFrame Gets the timeframe in which the indicator is calculated. public Timeframe TimeFrame { get; } Property Value Timeframe Methods AddSource(AppliedPrice) Adds a source that reads directly from a candle price. public IndicatorConfig AddSource(AppliedPrice price) Parameters price AppliedPrice The applied price field. Returns IndicatorConfig The current configuration instance. AddSource(string, int, Timeframe?) Adds an indicator source that reads from another indicator buffer. public IndicatorConfig AddSource(string indicatorId, int bufferIndex = 0, Timeframe? timeframe = null) Parameters indicatorId string The source indicator identifier. bufferIndex int The buffer index to read from. Default is 0. timeframe Timeframe? Optional timeframe override for the source. Returns IndicatorConfig The current configuration instance. GetFingerprint() Builds a deterministic fingerprint string used for caching and identity comparison. public string GetFingerprint() Returns string A stable key composed of symbol, timeframe, indicator type, custom name (if any), sources, and parameter hash. SetParam(string, object?, object) Sets or overrides a parameter value. If value is null, defaultValue is used. public IndicatorConfig SetParam(string key, object? value, object defaultValue) Parameters key string Parameter key. value object Runtime value (nullable). defaultValue object Fallback value if value is null. Returns IndicatorConfig The current configuration instance.

Use Fixed for a constant color, or BullishBearish to switch between BullishColor and BearishColor based on the relative positions of the upper and lower buffers. public IndicatorFillColorMode ColorMode { get; set; } Property Value IndicatorFillColorMode Enabled Gets or sets whether the fill is currently active. public bool Enabled { get; set; } Property Value bool FillColor Gets or sets the color used when ColorMode is Fixed. public IndicatorColor FillColor { get; set; } Property Value IndicatorColor LowerBufferIndex Gets or sets the buffer index whose values define the bottom boundary of the fill. public int LowerBufferIndex { get; set; } Property Value int Name Gets or sets a human-readable label for this region (e.g. "Kumo"). public string Name { get; set; } Property Value string Opacity Gets or sets the fill transparency (0 = fully transparent, 255 = fully opaque). Default is 72. public byte Opacity { get; set; } Property Value byte UpperBufferIndex Gets or sets the buffer index whose values define the top boundary of the fill. public int UpperBufferIndex { get; set; } Property Value int Visible Gets or sets whether the fill is shown in the indicator settings dialog. public bool Visible { get; set; } Property Value bool

api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators.Models.Indicat.summary: Class IndicatorItem Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators.Models Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Snapshot container for indicator values at a specific timestamp. Properties DisplayName Gets the display name for this snapshot from Property. public string DisplayName { get; } Property Value string The indicator display name. Identity Gets or sets identity metadata for this indicator instance. public IndicatorIdentity Identity { get; set; } Property Value IndicatorIdentity IndicatorId Gets or sets the runtime indicator instance ID. public string IndicatorId { get; set; } Property Value string Property Gets or sets rendering metadata for this indicator instance. public IndicatorProperty Property { get; set; } Property Value IndicatorProperty Timestamp Gets or sets the timestamp associated with this value snapshot. public DateTime Timestamp { get; set; } Property Value DateTime ValueTypes Gets or sets buffer type metadata keyed by buffer index. public IDictionary<int, IndicatorBufferType> ValueTypes { get; } Property Value IDictionary<int, IndicatorBufferType> Values Gets or sets numeric buffer values keyed by buffer index. public IDictionary<int, double> Values { get; } Property Value IDictionary<int, double> Methods Create(string, DateTime, IndicatorProperty, IndicatorIdentity, IDictionary<int, IndicatorBufferType>, IDictionary<int, double>) Creates a new IndicatorItem instance with the specified parameters. public static IndicatorItem Create(string indicatorId, DateTime timestamp, IndicatorProperty property, IndicatorIdentity identity, IDictionary<int, IndicatorBufferType> valueTypes, IDictionary<int, double> values) Parameters indicatorId string The unique identifier for the indicator instance. timestamp DateTime The timestamp associated with this value snapshot. property IndicatorProperty The rendering metadata for this indicator instance. identity IndicatorIdentity The identity metadata for this indicator instance. valueTypes IDictionary<int, IndicatorBufferType> The buffer type metadata keyed by buffer index. values IDictionary<int, double> The numeric buffer values keyed by buffer index. api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators.Models.Indicat.title: Class IndicatorLabel | Pt.Okx.Sdk API
api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators.Models.Indicat.summary: Class IndicatorLabel Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators.Models Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Rendering metadata for a single indicator plot (line, histogram, dots, …). Each visible buffer should have a corresponding IndicatorLabel entry in Labels. public class IndicatorLabel Inheritance object IndicatorLabel Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Properties Color Gets or sets the fallback color for this plot. Used when ColorIndexBuffer is not set or yields no valid palette entry. Default is Blue. public IndicatorColor Color { get; set; } Property Value IndicatorColor ColorIndexBuffer Gets or sets the optional buffer index that contains per-point color indexes for this plot. The referenced buffer must be registered as ColorIndex. When null, Color is used uniformly for every point. Each indicator label may reference a different color-index buffer, so a multi-line indicator can have each line change color independently. public int? ColorIndexBuffer { get; set; } Property Value int? ColorPalette Gets the color palette used when ColorIndexBuffer is set. The key is an integer color index written into the color buffer by OnCalculate; the value is the IndicatorColor to render for that index. Points whose index is not present in the palette fall back to Color. public IDictionary<int, IndicatorColor> ColorPalette { get; set; } Property Value IDictionary<int, IndicatorColor> Examples ColorPalette = new Dictionary<int, IndicatorColor> { { 0, IndicatorColor.Red }, // bearish { 1, IndicatorColor.Lime } // bullish } Digit Gets or sets the optional number of decimal places shown for this plot in crosshair and tooltip overlays. When null, the indicator-level default precision is used. public int? Digit { get; set; } Property Value int? Label Gets or sets the human-readable name shown in the crosshair tooltip and legend. public string Label { get; set; } Property Value string Style Gets or sets the dash style for line-type plots. Default is Solid. public IndicatorStyle Style { get; set; } Property Value IndicatorStyle Type Gets or sets the draw primitive used to render this plot. Default is Line. public IndicatorDrawType Type { get; set; } Property Value IndicatorDrawType Visible Gets or sets whether this plot is currently visible on the chart. public bool Visible { get; set; } Property Value bool Width Gets or sets the stroke width. Default is 1.0. public double Width { get; set; } Property Value double

api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators.Models.Indicat.summary: Class IndicatorParameters Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators.Models Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Mutable parameter bag for indicator configuration. Provides typed set/get helpers and a deterministic hash for identity/fingerprints. public class IndicatorParameters Inheritance object IndicatorParameters Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Properties All Returns a shallow copy of all parameter entries. public IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object?> All { get; } Property Value IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object> A new dictionary containing the current key-value pairs. Returns bool true if the key exists; otherwise false. GetParametersHash() Computes a short deterministic hash from all parameters. api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators.Models.Indicat.summary: Class IndicatorProperty Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators.Models Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Display and buffer metadata for an indicator. Must match the SetBuffer calls made in OnInit. plots int Number of visible plots (informational). Properties Buffers Gets the total number of buffers allocated for this indicator, including Data, ColorIndex, and Calculations buffers. Must match the number of SetBuffer calls in OnInit. public int Buffers { get; } Property Value int IsInternal Gets or sets whether this indicator is hidden from the indicator selection menus. api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators.Models.html.title: Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators.Models | Pt.Okx.Sdk API
api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators.Models.html.summary: Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators.Models Classes IndicatorConfig Represents the runtime configuration used to create and identify an indicator instance. This includes the trading symbol, timeframe, indicator type, parameters, and optional input sources for chained indicators. IndicatorFillRegion Defines a shaded region drawn between two indicator buffers (e.g. Ichimoku Kumo cloud). IndicatorIdentity Represents the logical identity of an indicator instance. Combines symbol, timeframe, type, and parameter values. IndicatorItem Snapshot container for indicator values at a specific timestamp. Holds identity, rendering property metadata, and per-buffer values. IndicatorLabel Rendering metadata for a single indicator plot (line, histogram, dots, …). Each visible buffer should have a corresponding IndicatorLabel entry in Labels. IndicatorParameters Mutable parameter bag for indicator configuration. Provides typed set/get helpers and a deterministic hash for identity/fingerprints. IndicatorProperty Display and buffer metadata for an indicator. Passed to the chart engine to control how the indicator is rendered, which timeframes it appears on, and which additional UI elements (bounds, fills, …) are shown. IndicatorSource Describes one data source used by an indicator instance. The source can be either candle price data or another indicator buffer. IndicatorSpecialFeatures Optional display features for specific indicator families. These settings add extra chart elements such as bound lines, a zero line, histogram coloring, and fill regions between buffers. Structs IndicatorValue Represents a single indicator value with its associated timestamp, including support for empty-value semantics.

It is not intended for mode-specific trade/export logs. api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.IStrategy.html.title: Interface IStrategy | Pt.Okx.Sdk API
api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.IStrategy.html.summary: Interface IStrategy Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Defines the lifecycle and execution contract for a trading strategy. public interface IStrategy Remarks A strategy is initialized once, then executed repeatedly based on incoming events, and eventually stopped when no longer needed. Methods InitializeAsync(IStrategyStateStore, CancellationToken) Initializes the strategy with the provided state store. Task<bool> InitializeAsync(IStrategyStateStore state, CancellationToken cancellationToken) Parameters state IStrategyStateStore The strategy state store used to persist and retrieve internal state. cancellationToken CancellationToken A token used to cancel the initialization process. Returns Task<bool> true if initialization succeeded; otherwise false. RunAsync(StrategyEventType, IStrategyStateStore, CancellationToken) Executes the strategy logic for a given event. Task RunAsync(StrategyEventType eventType, IStrategyStateStore state, CancellationToken ct) Parameters eventType StrategyEventType The event that triggered execution (e.g., new tick, new bar, timer, order, algo order, balance, transaction, position). state IStrategyStateStore The strategy state store for reading or updating internal state. ct CancellationToken A token used to cancel execution. Returns Task A task representing the execution operation. StopAsync(CancellationToken) Stops the strategy and performs any required cleanup. Task<bool> StopAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken) Parameters cancellationToken CancellationToken A token used to cancel the stop process. Returns Task<bool> true if the strategy stopped successfully; otherwise false.

api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.IStrategyLogger..summary: Interface IStrategyLogger Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Interface for logging strategy events, state changes, signals, and notifications in trading systems. public interface IStrategyLogger Extension Methods InputParamLoggingExtensions.LogInputParams<TSchema>(IStrategyLogger, TSchema, string) Methods LogConfig(string, params (string key, string value)[]) Logs configuration key-value pairs with a title. void LogConfig(string title, params (string key, string value)[] data) Parameters title string The configuration section title. data (string key, string value)[] The key-value pairs to log. LogConsole(PtLogLevel, Exception?, string, params object?[]) Logs a message to the console at a specific log level, with an optional exception. void LogConsole(PtLogLevel level, Exception? exception, string message, params object?[] detailsArgs) Parameters level PtLogLevel The log level. exception Exception The exception to log (optional). message string The message to log. detailsArgs object[] Arguments for the message template. LogConsole(PtLogLevel, string, params object?[]) Logs a message to the console at a specific log level. void LogConsole(PtLogLevel level, string message, params object?[] detailsArgs) Parameters level PtLogLevel The log level. message string The message to log. detailsArgs object[] Arguments for the message template. LogCritical(Exception, string, string?, params object?[]) Logs a critical error with an exception. void LogCritical(Exception ex, string title, string? detailsTemplate = null, params object?[] detailsArgs) Parameters ex Exception The exception to log. title string The log entry title. detailsTemplate string The message template (optional). detailsArgs object[] Arguments for the message template. LogCritical(string, string?, params object?[]) Logs a critical error message. void LogCritical(string title, string? detailsTemplate = null, params object?[] detailsArgs) Parameters title string The log entry title. detailsTemplate string The message template (optional). detailsArgs object[] Arguments for the message template. LogDebug(string, string?, params object?[]) Logs a debug-level message. void LogDebug(string title, string? detailsTemplate = null, params object?[] detailsArgs) Parameters title string The log entry title. detailsTemplate string The message template (optional). detailsArgs object[] Arguments for the message template. LogEntry(string, OrderSide, decimal, decimal, decimal, decimal) Logs an entry order event. void LogEntry(string symbol, OrderSide side, decimal quantity, decimal price, decimal sl, decimal tp) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. side OrderSide The order side (buy/sell). quantity decimal The order quantity. price decimal The entry price. sl decimal The stop-loss price. tp decimal The take-profit price. LogError(Exception, string, string?, params object?[]) Logs an error with an exception. void LogError(Exception ex, string title, string? detailsTemplate = null, params object?[] detailsArgs) Parameters ex Exception The exception to log. title string The log entry title. detailsTemplate string The message template (optional). detailsArgs object[] Arguments for the message template. LogExit(string, string, OrderSide, decimal, decimal, decimal, decimal) Logs an exit order event. void LogExit(string symbol, string reason, OrderSide side, decimal qtyFill, decimal entryPrice, decimal exitPrice, decimal pnl) Parameters symbol string The trading symbol. reason string The reason for exit. side OrderSide The order side (buy/sell). qtyFill decimal The filled quantity. entryPrice decimal The entry price. exitPrice decimal The exit price. pnl decimal The profit or loss. LogInformation(string, string?, params object?[]) Logs an informational message. void LogInformation(string title, string? detailsTemplate = null, params object?[] detailsArgs) Parameters title string The log entry title. detailsTemplate string The message template (optional). detailsArgs object[] Arguments for the message template. LogKeyValues(string, string, params (string key, string value)[]) Logs a set of key-value pairs with a title and message. void LogKeyValues(string title, string message, params (string key, string value)[] data) Parameters title string The log section title. message string The message to log. data (string key, string value)[] The key-value pairs to log. LogRecovery(string, PtLogLevel) Logs a recovery event with a message and log level. void LogRecovery(string message, PtLogLevel level = PtLogLevel.Warning) Parameters message string The recovery message. level PtLogLevel The log level (default: Warning). LogSignal(string, string) Logs a trading signal event. void LogSignal(string signalType, string details = "") Parameters signalType string The type of signal. details string Additional details about the signal. LogSmart(PtLogLevel, Exception, string, string?, params object?[]) Logs a smart message with an exception at a specific log level. void LogSmart(PtLogLevel level, Exception ex, string title, string? detailsTemplate = null, params object?[] detailsArgs) Parameters level PtLogLevel The log level. ex Exception The exception to log. title string The log entry title. detailsTemplate string The message template (optional). detailsArgs object[] Arguments for the message template. LogSmart(PtLogLevel, string, string?, params object?[]) Logs a smart message at a specific log level. void LogSmart(PtLogLevel level, string title, string? detailsTemplate = null, params object?[] detailsArgs) Parameters level PtLogLevel The log level. title string The log entry title. detailsTemplate string The message template (optional). detailsArgs object[] Arguments for the message template. LogStateChange(string, string, string) Logs a state change event with automatic emoji based on the state keyword. void LogStateChange(string fromState, string toState, string reason = "") Parameters fromState string The previous state (e.g., "idle", "position_open"). toState string The new state (use keywords from remarks above for emoji). reason string The reason for the state change (optional, max ~100 chars recommended). Remarks GREEN emoji (🟢) - Active/Running states: "active"Bot is active "idle"Bot is idle and ready "open"Position is open "started"Bot/process started "running"Bot is running "position_open"Position opened RED emoji (🔴) - Inactive/Error states: "closed"Position/session closed "stopped"Bot stopped "ended"Process ended "error"Error occurred "failed"Action failed "blocked"Bot blocked/paused YELLOW/SPINNER emoji (🔄) - Pending/Transitional states: "pending"State pending "waiting"Waiting for something "init"Initialization "recovery"Recovery process "entry_pending"Waiting for entry order fill "reversing_pending"Reversing position pending DEFAULT emoji (➡️) - Unknown/other states (not in list above) Note: Use lowercase state names for consistent emoji mapping. LogSuccess(string, string?, params object?[]) Logs a success message. void LogSuccess(string title, string? detailsTemplate = null, params object?[] detailsArgs) Parameters title string The log entry title. detailsTemplate string The message template (optional). detailsArgs object[] Arguments for the message template. LogWarning(string, string?, params object?[]) Logs a warning message. void LogWarning(string title, string? detailsTemplate = null, params object?[] detailsArgs) Parameters title string The log entry title. detailsTemplate string The message template (optional). detailsArgs object[] Arguments for the message template. NotifyDocument(string, string) Sends a notification with a document attachment. void NotifyDocument(string title, string filePath) Parameters title string The notification title. filePath string The path to the document file. NotifyError(string, Exception) Sends a notification for an error event. void NotifyError(string title, Exception ex) Parameters title string The notification title. ex Exception The exception to notify about. NotifyKeyValue(string, params (string key, string value)[]) Sends a notification with key-value pairs. void NotifyKeyValue(string title, params (string key, string value)[] data) Parameters title string The notification title. data (string key, string value)[] The key-value pairs to notify. NotifyTrace(string, string, PtLogLevel) Sends a trace notification with a message and log level. void NotifyTrace(string title, string message, PtLogLevel level = PtLogLevel.Information) Parameters title string The notification title. message string The trace message. level PtLogLevel The log level (default: Information).

api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.IStrategyStateSt.title: Interface IStrategyStateStore | Pt.Okx.Sdk API
api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.IStrategyStateSt.summary: Interface IStrategyStateStore Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Represents a state container for a trading strategy, providing access to orders, positions, balances, and market data, as well as methods to apply updates from events. public interface IStrategyStateStore Remarks This interface acts as the central state for a strategy, allowing it to: Inspect current trading state (orders, positions, balances). Respond to incoming events via Apply(StrategyEvent). Be rebuilt from external snapshots (e.g., exchange sync). Properties AlgoOrderCount Gets the number of active algorithmic orders. int AlgoOrderCount { get; } Property Value int AlgoOrders Gets the list of active algorithmic orders (e.g., stop-loss, take-profit). IReadOnlyList<AlgoOrder> AlgoOrders { get; } Property Value IReadOnlyList<AlgoOrder> Balances Gets the account balances. IReadOnlyList<AccountBalance> Balances { get; } Property Value IReadOnlyList<AccountBalance> HasOpenOrders Gets a value indicating whether there are open orders. bool HasOpenOrders { get; } Property Value bool HasOpenPosition Gets a value indicating whether there is any open position. bool HasOpenPosition { get; } Property Value bool HasProtectiveAlgoOrders Gets a value indicating whether protective algorithmic orders (e.g., stop-loss or take-profit) exist. bool HasProtectiveAlgoOrders { get; } Property Value bool LastKline Gets the most recent candle (kline) data. CandleData? LastKline { get; } Property Value CandleData? OpenOrderCount Gets the number of currently open orders. int OpenOrderCount { get; } Property Value int Orders Gets the list of active orders. IReadOnlyList<Order> Orders { get; } Property Value IReadOnlyList<Order> Positions Gets the current open positions. IReadOnlyList<Position> Positions { get; } Property Value IReadOnlyList<Position> TradeCommand Gets the trading command interface used to place or modify orders. TradeCommand TradeCommand { get; } Property Value TradeCommand Transactions Gets the list of executed transactions. IReadOnlyList<Transaction> Transactions { get; } Property Value IReadOnlyList<Transaction> Methods Apply(StrategyEvent) Applies a strategy event to update the internal state. void Apply(StrategyEvent evt) Parameters evt StrategyEvent The incoming strategy event. ApplyKline(CandleData) Updates the latest candle data. void ApplyKline(CandleData data) Parameters data CandleData The new candle (kline) data. Rebuild(AccountBalance[], Position[], Order[], AlgoOrder[]) Rebuilds the entire state from external data sources. Typically used for synchronization with the exchange or recovery scenarios. void Rebuild(AccountBalance[] balances, Position[] position, Order[] openOrders, AlgoOrder[] algoOrders) Parameters balances AccountBalance[] The account balances. position Position[] The current positions. openOrders Order[] The open orders. algoOrders AlgoOrder[] The algorithmic orders.

api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters.IInpu.title: Interface IInputParamManager | Pt.Okx.Sdk API
api/Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters.IInpu.summary: Interface IInputParamManager Namespace Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy.Parameters Assembly Pt.Okx.Sdk.dll Manages input parameters for a strategy or component, including loading, validation, and change notification. public interface IInputParamManager Extension Methods InputParamBindingExtensions.BindSchema<TSchema>(IInputParamManager) Remarks This interface provides a centralized way to access and update runtime-configurable parameters, supporting persistence and validation. Properties Keys Gets the collection of parameter keys. IEnumerable<string> Keys { get; } Property Value IEnumerable<string> Parameters Gets the collection of all registered parameters. IReadOnlyDictionary<string, InputParameter> Parameters { get; } Property Value IReadOnlyDictionary<string, InputParameter> Methods GetParameter(string) Gets the full parameter definition for the specified key. InputParameter? GetParameter(string key) Parameters key string The parameter key. Returns InputParameter The parameter definition if found; otherwise null. GetValueRange(string) Gets the value range constraint for the specified parameter. ValueRange? GetValueRange(string key) Parameters key string The parameter key. Returns ValueRange The associated ValueRange if defined; otherwise null. GetValue<TValue>(string, TValue) Gets the value of a parameter with the specified key. TValue GetValue<TValue>(string key, TValue defaultValue = default) Parameters key string The parameter key. defaultValue TValue The default value to return if the parameter does not exist or cannot be converted. Returns TValue The parameter value or the specified default value. Type Parameters TValue The expected value type. HasParameter(string) Determines whether a parameter with the specified key exists. bool HasParameter(string key) Parameters key string The parameter key. Returns bool true if the parameter exists; otherwise false. LoadFromDefaults(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, InputParameter>, string) Loads parameters from code-defined defaults, merging with an existing JSON file if present. If the JSON file exists, user-modified values are preserved for matching keys. If the JSON file does not exist, or the schema has changed (keys differ), a new JSON file is written with merged data. void LoadFromDefaults(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, InputParameter> defaults, string filePath) Parameters defaults IReadOnlyDictionary<string, InputParameter> The default parameters declared in plugin code. filePath string The path to the JSON parameter file for persistence. LoadFromFile(string) Loads parameters from a file. void LoadFromFile(string filePath) Parameters filePath string The path to the parameter file. SaveToFile(string) Saves parameters to a file. void SaveToFile(string filePath) Parameters filePath string The path to the output file. SetValue(string, object) Sets the value of a parameter. void SetValue(string key, object value) Parameters key string The parameter key. value object The value to set. ValidateAll() Validates all parameters and returns validation errors. Dictionary<string, string> ValidateAll() Returns Dictionary<string, string> A dictionary of parameter keys and corresponding error messages. Empty if all parameters are valid. ValidateParameter(string, object, out string) Validates a single parameter value. bool ValidateParameter(string key, object value, out string errorMessage) Parameters key string The parameter key. value object The value to validate. errorMessage string The validation error message if invalid. Returns bool true if the value is valid; otherwise false. Events ParameterChanged Occurs when a parameter value has been changed. event EventHandler<ParameterChangedEventArgs>? ParameterChanged Event Type EventHandler<ParameterChangedEventArgs> ParametersLoaded Occurs when parameters have been loaded from an external source. event EventHandler? ParametersLoaded Event Type EventHandler

index.html.title: Pt.Okx.Sdk API Documentation | Pt.Okx.Sdk API
index.html.summary: Pt.Okx.Sdk API Documentation Pt.Okx.Sdk is the contracts library for the Platinum Trading Platform (supporting OKX exchange futures & swaps) — it contains all the interfaces, enums, models, and patterns (such as ApiResult) that other components in the solution consume. Namespaces Namespace Description Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients Client interfaces: IOkxClient, ITradeClient, ITimeSeriesClient, IAccountClient, IInstrumentClient Pt.Okx.Sdk.Common ApiResult / ApiResult<T> pattern for error handling Pt.Okx.Sdk.Enums Enums: Timeframe, OrderSide, OrderType, InstrumentType, TradeMode, ... Pt.Okx.Sdk.Indicators Indicator base classes (CalcIndBase, IIndicator, IIndicatorBuffer) and plugin interfaces Pt.Okx.Sdk.Strategy Strategy interfaces: IStrategy, IStrategyStateStore, IStrategyLogger Pt.Okx.Sdk.Drawing Drawing manager interfaces and chart objects Pt.Okx.Sdk.Notifier Telegram command extension interface Pt.Okx.Sdk.Storage Storage path provider abstraction Quick Links API Reference Architecture Overview Pt.Okx.Sdk ← Contracts (this library) ^ | Core Engine ← Engine: OKX wrapper, indicators, socket, simulator ^ ^ | | CLI Bot Platinum Trade App

migration.html.title: Migration Guide | Pt.Okx.Sdk API
migration.html.summary: Migration Guide This guide assists in migrating from standard OKX REST/WebSocket API wrappers (or legacy integrations) to the structured Pt.Okx.Sdk. 1. Key Platform Rules Unlike generic exchange wrappers, Pt.Okx.Sdk enforces strict constraints to ensure production safety and compatibility with the Platinum Trade desktop host: Single Asset Mode: You must set your OKX Account Settings to "Single-currency margin mode" (or "Multi-currency margin mode" if qualified), but the SDK is optimized primarily for single margin configurations. Isolated Margin Only: All swap position and trading commands are constrained to Isolated Margin (instType=SWAP, mgnMode=isolated). Cross-margin or portfolio-margin modes are currently not supported via the standard strategy wrappers. Decimal Precision: All prices, sizes, and volumes use the decimal type rather than double or float to prevent floating-point rounding errors during order execution. 2. API Structural Map Below is the mapping from raw OKX REST API endpoints to the corresponding unified SDK service calls: Raw OKX API Endpoint Legacy Method Pt.Okx.Sdk Service Call /api/v5/market/candles GetCandles(...) client.MarketData.GetCandlesAsync(...) /api/v5/trade/order PlaceOrder(...) client.Trade.PlaceOrderAsync(...) /api/v5/account/balance GetBalance(...) client.Account.GetBalanceAsync(...) /api/v5/account/positions GetPositions(...) client.Account.GetPositionsAsync(...) 3. Code Migration Example Before (Raw API Wrapper / Manual Request) var client = new LegacyOkxRestClient(); var response = await client.PlaceOrderAsync( instId: "BTC-USDT-SWAP", tdMode: "isolated", side: "buy", ordType: "market", sz: "0.01" ); After (Pt.Okx.Sdk Structured Request) var client = new OkxClient(botConfig); var response = await client.Trade.PlaceOrderAsync(new PlaceOrderRequest { InstrumentId = "BTC-USDT-SWAP", TradeMode = TradeMode.Isolated, Side = OrderSide.Buy, OrderType = OrderType.Market, Quantity = 0.01m });

quickstart.html.title: SDK Quickstart | Pt.Okx.Sdk API
quickstart.html.summary: SDK Quickstart This guide will help you get started with Pt.Okx.Sdk to interact with the OKX exchange in C#. 1. Installation Install the package into your project via the dotnet CLI: dotnet add package Pt.Okx.Sdk 2. Initialization Initialize the IOkxClient to access OKX trading and market data interfaces: using Pt.Okx.Sdk.Clients; using Pt.Okx.Sdk.Notifier.Models; // Setup optional notification configuration var botConfig = new TelegramBotConfig { Token = "YOUR_BOT_TOKEN", ChatId = "YOUR_CHAT_ID" }; // Instantiate the primary client interface IOkxClient client = new OkxClient(botConfig); 3. Fetching Market Data Retrieve recent candlestick history (OHLCV) from the OKX REST API: var result = await client.MarketData.GetCandlesAsync("BTC-USDT-SWAP", "1m", limit: 100); if (result.IsSuccess) { foreach (var candle in result.Data) { Console.WriteLine($"Time: {candle.Time}, Close: {candle.Close}"); } } else { Console.WriteLine($"API Error: {result.Error.Message} (Code: {result.Error.Code})"); } 4. Live Tick Subscription Subscribe to real-time tick updates using OKX WebSocket feeds: client.MarketData.SubscribeToTicks("ETH-USDT-SWAP", tick => { Console.WriteLine($"Live ETH-USDT-SWAP Tick Price: {tick.LastPrice}"); });
